headline: Abu Dhabi's Al Ramz unveils ARAM Capital Partners to capitalize on regional decoupling

headline: KKR doubles down on the Gulf despite Middle East war
summary: Speaking to CNBC in Abu Dhabi, Tara Davies, Co‑Head of KKR EMEA said short‑term volatility has not altered the firm’s commitment to the Middle East, where the firm has operated for 17 years and inked around $2 billion in deals in the last year.
